ItacPersonItem.Notes: He was member of the order of "francescani minoriti" and was particularly interested in astrology and medicine. He co-founded the Vespertini Academy with Ovidio Montalbani. See his biography by Alessandro Ottaviani in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
